events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor'.

angles.name: J-Lo's Best
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J-Lo! What's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez track to get you on the dancefloor?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Energy
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the rock 'n' roll icon, Sir Mick Jagger! Still moving like Jagger after all these years – what's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, the first 24-hour music video channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural broadcast.

angles.name: MTV's Impact
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played. What's your favourite music video of all time?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! A game-changer for Britpop. Which track still gives you goosebumps?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Flashback
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Elvis Presley's 49th death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music still moves generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur's incredible impact on music and culture today. What's his most powerful lyric for you?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix's 56th death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 83.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after his passing. His guitar wizardry redefined music. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, in the UK, and October 1, 1969, in the US.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks – which one is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still as cool as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment or track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in October 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and hope still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple launched its first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed music on the go forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. The legendary Beatles co-founder was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the comedic genius, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us endless laughs. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A double LP full of diverse tracks. What's your standout song from this iconic record?
